# nuxt4-boilerplate вЂ” Extended AI Documentation

> This file provides detailed context for AI assistants, code generation tools,
> and LLM-based developer tools working with this codebase.

## Project Identity

- **Name**: nuxt4-boilerplate
- **Type**: Nuxt 4 enterprise frontend boilerplate
- **Tech stack**: Nuxt 4, Vue 3, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, @nuxt/ui, Pinia, Nitro
- **Architecture**: SSR with SPA dashboard (routeRules per path)
- **Testing**: Not yet added вЂ” see CONTRIBUTING.md for guidance
- **Package manager**: npm

## Directory Structure

```
nuxt4-boilerplate/
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ app/                         # Nuxt 4 srcDir
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ ai/
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ prompts/
в”‚   в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ index.ts         # Prompt registry entry point
в”‚   в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ groups.ts        # Categorized prompt templates
в”‚   в”‚       в””в”Ђв”Ђ system.ts        # System-level assistant prompts
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ assets/css/main.css      # Global Tailwind CSS
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ components/
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ ai/                  # All AI UI components
в”‚   в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Panel.vue        # Slide-over AI assistant panel
в”‚   в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ MessageList.vue  # Scrollable message list
в”‚   в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Message.vue      # Single chat message
в”‚   в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ MarkdownContent.vue  # Safe inline markdown renderer
в”‚   в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Input.vue        # Chat input with file attach
в”‚   в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ PromptPicker.vue # Searchable prompt browser
в”‚   в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ CommandPalette.vue  # Ctrl+K command palette
в”‚   в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ ToolResult.vue   # MCP/tool result display
в”‚   в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ EmptyState.vue   # Empty chat state with suggestions
в”‚   в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ StreamCursor.vue # Blinking streaming cursor
в”‚   в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ FileChip.vue     # Attached file badge
в”‚   в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ CitationBadge.vue  # Citation/source badge
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ base/
в”‚   в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ DataTable.vue    # Generic sortable data table
в”‚   в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ StatsCard.vue    # KPI stat card
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ dashboard/
в”‚   в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Header.vue       # Dashboard top bar (with AI toggle)
в”‚   в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ Sidebar.vue      # Dashboard sidebar nav
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ shared/
в”‚   в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ ColorModeToggle.vue
в”‚   в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ LanguageSwitcher.vue
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ website/
в”‚   в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Header.vue
в”‚   в”‚       в””в”Ђв”Ђ Footer.vue
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ composables/
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ useAiChat.ts         # Streaming AI chat composable
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ usePrompts.ts        # Prompt template management
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ useMcp.ts            # MCP protocol integration
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ useAuth.ts           # Auth helpers
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ useApiClient.ts      # HTTP client
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ usePermissions.ts    # RBAC helpers
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ useSeo.ts            # SEO metadata helper
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ useTenant.ts         # Multi-tenant helpers
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ layouts/
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ dashboard.vue        # Dashboard layout (includes AiPanel)
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ default.vue          # Public page layout
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ auth.vue             # Auth page layout
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ middleware/
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ auth.ts              # Route auth guard
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ permissions.ts       # RBAC route guard
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ tenant.global.ts     # Global tenant detection
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ pages/
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ index.vue            # Landing page
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ about.vue
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ contact.vue
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ auth/login.vue
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ dashboard/
в”‚   в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ index.vue        # Dashboard home
в”‚   в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ ai/index.vue     # Full-screen AI assistant
в”‚   в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ reports.vue
в”‚   в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ settings.vue     # Includes AI settings section
в”‚   в”‚       в””в”Ђв”Ђ users/index.vue
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ plugins/
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ ai.client.ts         # AI store init + provider config
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ auth.client.ts       # Auth init
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ stores/
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ ai.ts                # AI Pinia store
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ auth.ts              # Auth Pinia store
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ tenant.ts            # Tenant Pinia store
в”‚       в””в”Ђв”Ђ ui.ts                # UI Pinia store
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ locales/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ en.json                  # English translations (includes ai.*)
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ de.json                  # German translations (includes ai.*)
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ server/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ api/health.get.ts        # GET /api/health endpoint
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ middleware/security.ts   # Security headers
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ shared/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ types/
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ index.ts             # Re-exports all types
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ ai.ts                # AI-specific TypeScript types
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ utils/index.ts           # Shared utilities
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ public/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ llms.txt                 # AI-readable project summary
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ llms-full.txt            # This file
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ deploy/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ nginx/nuxt4-app.conf     # Nginx reverse proxy config
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ caddy/Caddyfile          # Caddy reverse proxy config
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ vercel/vercel.json       # Vercel deployment config
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ .github/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ workflows/ci.yml         # CI pipeline
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ dependabot.yml           # Dependency updates
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ nuxt.config.ts               # Nuxt configuration
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Dockerfile                   # Multi-stage production Dockerfile
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ docker-compose.yml           # Local dev + prod-like compose
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ .env.example                 # Environment variable reference
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ README.md                    # Full documentation
в””в”Ђв”Ђ CONTRIBUTING.md              # Team workflow guide
```

## AI Layer вЂ” Detailed

### Data Flow

```
User types message
  в†’ AiInput.vue emits 'send'
  в†’ AiPanel.vue / ai/index.vue calls useAiChat().sendMessage()
  в†’ useAiChat reads aiStore.settings.provider.baseUrl
  в†’ POST {baseUrl}/chat/completions (OpenAI-compatible SSE)
  в†’ ReadableStream chunks parsed, appended to message in aiStore
  в†’ AiMessageList re-renders as stream arrives
  в†’ AiMessage renders via AiMarkdownContent
```

### State Shape (aiStore)

```typescript
{
  panelOpen: boolean,
  commandPaletteOpen: boolean,
  promptPickerOpen: boolean,
  conversations: AiConversation[],      // persisted to localStorage
  activeConversationId: string | null,
  isStreaming: boolean,
  settings: {
    provider: {
      kind: 'openai' | 'anthropic' | 'azure-openai' | 'custom',
      baseUrl: string,      // from NUXT_PUBLIC_AI_BASE_URL
      modelId: string,
      maxTokens: number,
      temperature: number,
      topP: number,
    },
    enabled: boolean,
    streamingEnabled: boolean,
    showCitations: boolean,
    maxConversations: number,
    systemPromptOverride?: string,
  }
}
```

### Prompt Template Format

```typescript
interface PromptTemplate {
  id: string,               // e.g. 'analysis.swot'
  label: string,
  description?: string,
  category: PromptCategory, // general | analysis | writing | coding | data | ...
  template: string,         // supports {{variable}} interpolation
  variables?: PromptVariable[],
  isSuggested?: boolean,    // shown in empty state
  icon?: string,            // heroicons name
  version?: string,         // for tracking changes
  isSystem?: boolean,       // if true, prepended as system message
}
```

### Adding New Prompts

1. Open `app/ai/prompts/groups.ts`
2. Add a new `PromptTemplate` to the appropriate `PromptGroup.prompts` array
3. Set `isSuggested: true` to feature it in the empty state
4. The UI picks up the change automatically вЂ” no other changes needed

### MCP Integration Points

```typescript
// useMcp.ts provides:
loadTools()                          // lists tools from MCP server
callTool(name, args)                 // executes a tool
loadResources()                      // lists available resources
getResource(uri)                     // reads resource content
loadPrompts()                        // lists MCP server prompts
getMcpPrompt(name, args)             // renders a server-side prompt
runToolAndInjectResult(name, args)   // calls tool + adds to conversation
```

### Provider Adapter

To swap AI providers:
1. Point `NUXT_PUBLIC_AI_BASE_URL` at a different endpoint
2. Change `NUXT_PUBLIC_AI_DEFAULT_MODEL` to the target model
3. For non-OpenAI formats, modify `streamResponse()` / `fetchFullResponse()` in `useAiChat.ts`
4. The store and UI remain unchanged

## Coding Conventions

- **No semicolons** (ESLint stylistic)
- **Single quotes** for strings
- **2-space indentation**
- **No `var`** вЂ” use `const`/`let`
- Components use `<script setup lang="ts">`
- Stores use Pinia composition API (setup stores)
- Types from `~~/shared/types` (double tilde = repo root)
- App imports use `~/` (single tilde = app/ srcDir)
- Composables use `useXxx` naming
- Store files use `useXxxStore` naming

## i18n Keys (AI-related)

All AI translations live under the `ai.*` namespace:
- `ai.assistant` вЂ” panel title
- `ai.emptyTitle` / `ai.emptySubtitle` вЂ” empty state
- `ai.suggestions` вЂ” suggested prompts heading
- `ai.inputPlaceholder` / `ai.inputHint` вЂ” input area
- `ai.commandPalette` / `ai.commandPlaceholder` вЂ” command palette
- `ai.notConfiguredWarning` / `ai.configureNow` вЂ” provider warning

Settings translations under `settings.ai*`:
- `settings.ai` вЂ” section heading
- `settings.aiBaseUrl` / `settings.aiModel` / etc. вЂ” form fields

## Environment Variable Reference (Complete)

| Variable | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `NUXT_PUBLIC_AI_BASE_URL` | public | AI gateway endpoint (OpenAI-compatible) |
| `NUXT_PUBLIC_AI_DEFAULT_MODEL` | public | Default model ID |
| `NUXT_PUBLIC_AI_DEFAULT_PROVIDER` | public | Provider kind |
| `NUXT_PUBLIC_MCP_SERVER_URL` | public | MCP server URL |
| `NUXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL` | public | REST API base URL |
| `NUXT_PUBLIC_AUTH_BASE_URL` | public | Auth service base URL |
| `NUXT_PUBLIC_APP_NAME` | public | App display name |
| `NUXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL` | public | App public URL |
| `JWT_SECRET` | server-only | JWT signing secret |
| `API_SECRET` | server-only | Internal API secret |

## Security Notes

- AI API keys MUST be handled server-side (gateway/proxy)
- No secrets in `NUXT_PUBLIC_*` variables
- `AiMarkdownContent` escapes HTML before processing вЂ” no XSS from AI responses
- File uploads are local object URLs only вЂ” not sent to external storage by default
- MCP server auth tokens are runtime-only, never in code

## Build & Dev Commands

```bash
npm run dev          # Start dev server
npm run build        # Production build
npm run start        # Start production server
npm run typecheck    # TypeScript type check
npm run lint         # ESLint
npm run ci:check     # lint + typecheck (for CI)
npm run commit       # Commitizen guided commit
```

## Deployment Targets

See README.md for detailed deployment guides for:
- Docker / VPS
- Vercel
- Node.js + PM2
- Heroku / Railway / Render
- AWS serverless (Nitro preset)
- Plesk / cPanel (static export fallback)
- Nginx / Caddy reverse proxy
